problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
